'''Ubrikkian Private Shipwrights' Contract''' was a part of the larger [[Ubrikkian Transports/Legends|Ubrikkian Transports]] company. As the name suggests, they specialized in creating ships for private investors. The company was best known for creating a myriad of luxury watercraft.

{{Company-stub}}
